body_excerpt: In composite_setup of composite.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege when connecting a malicious USB device with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In composite_setup of composite.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege when connecting a malicious USB device with n
